response: I am a dedicated, organized, and leadership-oriented individual with over 15 years of experience in medical transcription, specializing in various medical specialties. I have a strong foundation in medical terminology and possess excellent interpersonal skills, making me an effective team member and supervisor. I am passionate about my work and eager to contribute to a professional environment.
